text: Liquidity position appears adequate but warrants monitoring. As of Q2 2025, Airbnb maintained cash and equivalents of $18,444,000,000 against current liabilities of $18,816,000,000 [C035, C037]. The current ratio stood at 1.23 in Q2 2025 [K006], indicating sufficient short-term liquidity coverage. Notably, no long-term debt is reported on the balance sheet [C031], which reduces leverage risk. However, the company engaged in $807,000,000 of stock buybacks in Q1 2025 [C061], which could pressure cash reserves if sustained during periods of weaker operating cash flow.
